name: kittens-game-helper
description: Self-contained one-click Kittens Game autopilot — no external library. Drives the game's own API directly with reservation-backed plan execution, recursive prerequisite planning, native crafting/trade/religion/festivals/star events, policy automation, leader/mood care and a next-action advisor. Continues your existing browser save; prestige resets stay off.

scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run smoke && npm run simulate
